sentences.english: Regular exercise is extremely important for both physical and mental health.
sentences.korean: 정기적인 운동은 신체적 정신적 건강 모두에 매우 중요해요.

sentences.english: First it keeps your body strong and prevents diseases like diabetes and heart disease.
sentences.korean: 첫째 몸을 튼튼하게 유지하고 당뇨병이나 심장병 같은 질병을 예방해요.

sentences.english: Second exercise releases endorphins which naturally improve your mood and reduce stress.
sentences.korean: 둘째 운동은 엔도르핀을 분비해 자연스럽게 기분을 개선하고 스트레스를 줄여줘요.

sentences.english: For example after I started jogging three times a week I noticed I sleep better and feel more energetic during the day.
sentences.korean: 예를 들어 일주일에 세 번 조깅을 시작한 후 잠을 더 잘 자고 낮에 더 활기차게 느꼈어요.

sentences.english: Even just thirty minutes of walking a day can make a huge difference in your overall well-being.
sentences.korean: 하루 30분 걷기만으로도 전반적인 건강에 큰 차이를 만들 수 있어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: News from Social Media vs. Traditional Media
A Piece of Advice That Changed Your Life
